prompt: A dramatic Japanese motivational movie-poster style illustration set at dusk, mixing corporate burnout and hopeful space-dream fantasy. In the center foreground, an anthropomorphic Shiba Inu with warm tan fur smiles confidently at the viewer, wearing a sharp navy business suit, white dress shirt, and blue striped tie. The dog holds a black e-reader in the left paw with the screen text “kindle” and a black-and-gold fountain pen in the right paw. Behind the character, the background is split into two thematic halves that blend together: on the left, a dense Tokyo-like city skyline at sunset with Tokyo Tower glowing orange, dark office buildings, and exhausted salary workers at desks under a stressful atmosphere; on the right, a deep starry cosmos with blue nebulae, a rocket launching upward, 3 airplanes, a winding glowing golden trajectory line, 1 small planet, 2 floating paw prints, 2 packaged breads labeled “カンパン,” and 1 round biscuit labeled “南部せんべい.” Near the right lower background, show a family of 4 from behind walking toward the bright horizon with a dog, symbolizing hope and future dreams. Add 3 black signboards floating in the left midground with the Japanese words “残業,” “プレッシャー,” and “会議 満員電車.” In the foreground on a wooden desk, place exactly 3 prominently displayed books standing upright: book 1 on the left is white and blue with the title “忙しい社会人のやり直し英語勉強法” and a small illustrated author portrait; book 2 in the center is dark blue and gold with the large title “『あたりまえ』を続けることは 最強の生存戦略である”; book 3 on the right is white and blue with the title “『すぐやる』は最速の仕事術” and a large “5” plus a circular “5 MIN” icon. Also on the desk, include 1 black coffee mug with the text “未来は 5分で変わる,” 1 spiral notebook opened flat with a handwritten to-do list in Japanese reading “今日やること ① ブログを書く（5分） ② 家族と過ごす（大切） ③ 未来を信じる（ワクワク）” plus a paw-print doodle, 1 black fountain pen lying beside it, 1 globe on a stand at the far right, 1 plate of crackers, 1 extra packaged “カンパン,” and small framed photos at the lower left edge. At the top, large luxurious gold Japanese headline text reads “5分で宇宙へ！” with a smaller gold subtitle beneath: “〜たかお柴犬のサイドFIRE物語〜”. Below that, centered white copy reads “忙しい毎日に、たった5分。 犬だけど、夢は本気で掴んだ。” At the bottom center, add a cinematic English tagline: “Based on a true story of たかお柴犬” and beneath it “A heartwarming comedy-drama about taking small steps to big dreams”. Use ultra-detailed glossy poster rendering, warm orange sunset versus cool blue space contrast, inspirational commercial key art, sharp typography, rich cinematic lighting, whimsical but sincere tone, highly polished social-media poster composition, vertical format.
